final_text:
Notion AI's page-summarize feature costs $10/mo. Pasting the same page into Claude's free tier with "summarize in 3 bullets, flag anything that contradicts the rest of the doc" gets you the same output for most docs under ~5k words.

The gap shows up on longer, messier documents where Notion AI's page-context integration actually earns its price.

What's a paid AI feature you've found a $0 equivalent for — and where does the free version actually start to break down?
